title: DeploymentIoTJobConfiguration
description: Contains information about an IoT job configuration.

allOf.description: The rollout configuration for the job. This configuration defines the rate at which the job rolls out to the fleet of target devices.
The stop configuration for the job. This configuration defines when and how to stop a job rollout.
The timeout configuration for the job. This configuration defines the amount of time each device has to complete the job.
